arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives verdict on Joshua Zirkzee decision in Manchester United draw with Liverpool
arts.sum: After the worst possible start to his week, Joshua Zirkzee had the opportunity for the best possible end to it at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed immediate Trent Alexander-Arnold concern as Conor Bradley point made instantly
arts.sum: Ian Doyle looks at the main talking points after Liverpool were held to a 2-2 home Premier League draw by Manchester United on Sunday

arts.ttl: Why VAR recommended Liverpool penalty for Matthijs de Ligt handball
arts.sum: Matthijs de Ligt was penalised for handball after VAR recommended referee Michael Oliver review his original decision of no penalty.

arts.ttl: 'What we tend to forget' - Arne Slot makes honest Man Utd admission as Liverpool left frustrated
arts.sum: Arne Slot was speaking after Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Manchester United at Anfield

arts.ttl: How Liverpool's next five Premier League fixtures compare to Arsenal's
arts.sum: Comparing the upcoming Premier League fixture lists of title hopefuls Liverpool and Arsenal after the Reds drew with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Man Utd target set to snub transfer interest
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha is reportedly on the verge of agreeing a new contract with the relegation strugglers.

arts.ttl: How 'impressive' Man Utd caused problems on Liverpool's right side
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundit Alan Shearer analyses Manchester United's "impressive" Diogo Dalot and how he caused Liverpool's right-hand side problems in their 2-2 draw in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk points finger at Liverpool team-mates after Man Utd disappointment
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk gave an honest post-match assessment after Arne Slot's side dropped precious points in the title race against Manchester United at Anfield

arts.ttl: Draw to Man Utd a 'missed opportunity' for Liverpool in title race
arts.sum: Sunday's match was only the third time Liverpool have dropped points at home in the Premier League this season, and their head coach, Arne Slot, says Man Utd's performance was reminiscent of Nottingham Forest's win at Anfield in September. Despite the dropped points for Liverpool, former Man Utd midfielder Roy Keane, who won seven Premier League titles, thinks Slot's side should take the positives.

arts.ttl: Liverpool open to Nunez offers - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool open to Darwin Nunez offers, AC Milan consider Marcus Rashford loan, West Ham targets include Evan Ferguson, plus more.
